allow: Bash(node -e "const d=require\(''/Users/rajanrahman/CascadeProjects/windsurf-project-4/public/abilities.json''\); console.log\(Object.keys\(d\).length, ''abilities''\); const k=Object.keys\(d\)[0]; console.log\(''sample key:'', k, ''fields:'', Object.keys\(d[k]\).join\('', ''\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const d = JSON.parse\(require\(''fs''\).readFileSync\(''./public/abilities.json'',''utf8''\)\); const keys = Object.keys\(d\); console.log\(''Total abilities:'', keys.length\); const first = keys[0]; console.log\(''Sample entry key:'', first\); console.log\(''Sample entry:'', JSON.stringify\(d[first]\)\); console.log\(''All field names:'', JSON.stringify\(Object.keys\(d[first]\)\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const a = require\(''./public/abilities.json''\); const keys = Object.keys\(a\); console.log\(''Total:'', keys.length\); console.log\(''Sample key:'', keys[0]\); console.log\(''Sample value:'', JSON.stringify\(a[keys[0]]\)\); const edgeTypes = [...new Set\(keys.map\(k => a[k][''edge type'']\).filter\(Boolean\)\)]; console.log\(''Edge types:'', edgeTypes\); const techni = a[''Technician'']; console.log\(''Technician:'', JSON.stringify\(techni\)\); const pressure = a[''Pressure'']; console.log\(''Pressure:'', JSON.stringify\(pressure\)\); const roughSkin = a[''Rough Skin'']; console.log\(''Rough Skin:'', JSON.stringify\(roughSkin\)\); const hadron = a[''Hadron Engine'']; console.log\(''Hadron Engine:'', JSON.stringify\(hadron\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const a = require\(''./public/abilities.json''\); const total = Object.keys\(a\).length; const withEdge = Object.keys\(a\).filter\(k => a[k][''edge type'']\).length; console.log\(''Total abilities:'', total, ''| With edge type:'', withEdge, ''| Without:'', total - withEdge\);")
